We compare TDHook against existing mechanistic interpretability frameworks.

Table 1: Capabilities of neural network intervention frameworks.
captum ✓ ✗ ✗ ∼ 35+ 93%
nnsight ✓ ✓ ✓ ✗ 0 -
tdhook ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ 0 -

Related Work. NNsight [Smith et al., 2024] provides a unified interface for model
interventions. Our framework extends this design with additional circuit analysis tools.
